# Write a new guide or tutorial for the learning section content

Related to: https://github.com/neomjs/neo/issues/5963 (Please read this ticket first)

You can find the new learning section here:
https://neomjs.com/dist/production/apps/portal/#/learn/benefits.Multi-Threading

It would help a lot in case the community would support us with creating more content for the learning section.

In case you know areas where more guides are needed, but don't know the framework well enough to write the article yourself, please open new feature request tickets.

We can make the deal: Opening 5 new tickets which get confirmed is worth a hacktoberfest PR.

## Timeline

### @NishantSinghhhhh - 2024-10-02T17:19:13Z

Can you  Please this assign this issue to me .

### @tobiu - 2024-10-02T18:40:30Z

Hi and welcome @NishantSinghhhhh,

as mentioned inside the ticket description, this is a bulk-info-ticket. I guess we could easily create 50 - 100 new guides, in case we want to cover all areas of the Neo.mjs framework.

Call to action: pick an area which you want to write about, then we can create a new specific ticket and assign it to you.

Some ideas for areas:
* Working with `Neo.table.Container`
* Working with `Neo.tab.Container`
* Container Layouts
* Creating a form in Neo
* Working with a main thread addon
* Creating your first app
* Creating a custom component

For getting up to speed and finding more areas, I can recommend to walk through the following tutorial:
https://neomjs.com/dist/production/apps/portal/#/learn/tutorials.Earthquakes

Best regards,
Tobi
